title: Collaborative Editing Configuration
description: Comprehensive settings schema for Jupyter Notebook v7 real-time collaborative editing capabilities, enabling fine-grained control over multi-user coordination, CRDT synchronization, WebSocket communication, and collaborative workflow management.

enabled.title: Enable Collaborative Editing
enabled.description: Enable real-time collaborative editing capabilities for multi-user notebook sessions with CRDT-based conflict-free synchronization

serverConfiguration.title: Collaboration Server Configuration
serverConfiguration.description: WebSocket server and backend infrastructure settings for real-time collaborative synchronization

websocketUrl.title: WebSocket Server URL
websocketUrl.description: WebSocket endpoint for real-time collaboration server (e.g., ws://localhost:1234, wss://collab.example.com/api/yjs)

storageBackend.title: Persistence Storage Backend
storageBackend.description: Backend storage system for collaborative document persistence, session coordination, and version history management
enumDescriptions: In-memory storage (development only, no persistence)
Redis-based storage with pub/sub coordination
PostgreSQL relational database with ACID compliance
MongoDB document database for flexible schema
Multi-tier storage combining Redis, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB
Distributed storage with geographic replication

connectionTimeout.title: Connection Timeout (milliseconds)
connectionTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for WebSocket connection establishment before failing

maxReconnectAttempts.title: Maximum Reconnection Attempts
maxReconnectAttempts.description: Number of automatic reconnection attempts before switching to offline mode

reconnectDelay.title: Reconnection Delay (milliseconds)
reconnectDelay.description: Base delay between reconnection attempts with exponential backoff

sessionManagement.title: Collaborative Session Management
sessionManagement.description: Configuration for session lifecycle, user limits, and coordination policies

maxUsersPerSession.title: Maximum Users Per Session
maxUsersPerSession.description: Maximum number of concurrent users allowed in a single collaborative session

sessionTimeout.title: Session Timeout (seconds)
sessionTimeout.description: Automatic session cleanup timeout for inactive collaborative sessions

autoCleanupInactiveSessions.title: Auto-cleanup Inactive Sessions
autoCleanupInactiveSessions.description: Automatically remove users from sessions after prolonged inactivity

sessionPersistence.title: Session Persistence Level
sessionPersistence.description: How long session state persists after all users disconnect
enumDescriptions: Session deleted immediately when empty (0 minutes)
Session persists for 15 minutes after last user
Session persists for 1 hour after last user
Session persists for 24 hours after last user
Session persists indefinitely until explicitly deleted

synchronization.title: Real-Time Synchronization Settings
synchronization.description: CRDT-based document synchronization behavior and performance optimization

enableRealTimeSync.title: Enable Real-Time Synchronization
enableRealTimeSync.description: Enable instant propagation of document changes across all connected users

conflictResolutionStrategy.title: Conflict Resolution Strategy
conflictResolutionStrategy.description: Primary strategy for resolving concurrent editing conflicts in collaborative sessions
enumDescriptions: Most recent change overwrites conflicting changes
Transform operations to resolve conflicts automatically
Use CRDT algorithms for mathematically guaranteed conflict-free merging
Present conflicts to users for manual resolution

targetLatencyMs.title: Target Synchronization Latency (milliseconds)
targetLatencyMs.description: Target latency for collaborative edit propagation across users

operationBatchSize.title: Operation Batch Size
operationBatchSize.description: Number of operations to batch together for network efficiency

syncThrottleMs.title: Synchronization Throttle (milliseconds)
syncThrottleMs.description: Minimum interval between synchronization operations to prevent flooding

enableConflictResolution.title: Enable Automatic Conflict Resolution
enableConflictResolution.description: Automatically resolve editing conflicts using CRDT merge algorithms

maxSyncRetries.title: Maximum Sync Retries
maxSyncRetries.description: Number of retry attempts for failed synchronization operations

awareness.title: User Presence and Awareness Settings
awareness.description: Real-time user presence tracking, cursor synchronization, and activity indicators

enablePresence.title: Enable User Presence Tracking
enablePresence.description: Track and display active users with real-time presence indicators

enableCursorSync.title: Enable Cursor Position Synchronization
enableCursorSync.description: Synchronize and display cursor positions from other users in real-time

enableCellSelection.title: Enable Cell Selection Broadcasting
enableCellSelection.description: Broadcast cell selections and focus areas to other collaborative users

presenceTimeout.title: User Presence Timeout (milliseconds)
presenceTimeout.description: Duration before inactive users are removed from presence indicators

updateThrottleMs.title: Presence Update Throttle (milliseconds)
updateThrottleMs.description: Minimum interval between presence and cursor position updates

showUserColors.title: Show User-Specific Colors
showUserColors.description: Display color-coded indicators for different users in collaborative sessions

maxVisibleUsers.title: Maximum Visible Users
maxVisibleUsers.description: Maximum number of user avatars to display before showing overflow indicator

locking.title: Cell-Level Locking Configuration
locking.description: Cell-level coordination settings to prevent editing conflicts through intelligent lock management

enableLocking.title: Enable Cell-Level Locking
enableLocking.description: Enable automatic cell locking to prevent simultaneous editing conflicts

lockTimeout.title: Cell Lock Timeout (milliseconds)
lockTimeout.description: Maximum duration for cell-level editing locks before automatic release

enableAutoRelease.title: Enable Automatic Lock Release
enableAutoRelease.description: Automatically release cell locks when users navigate away or become inactive

lockAcquisitionStrategy.title: Lock Acquisition Strategy
lockAcquisitionStrategy.description: Strategy for handling lock conflicts when multiple users attempt to edit the same cell
enumDescriptions: Allow immediate editing with conflict resolution on save
Acquire exclusive locks before allowing any editing
Allow simultaneous editing with real-time CRDT merging
Queue lock requests and process them in order

showLockIndicators.title: Show Lock Indicators
showLockIndicators.description: Display visual indicators when cells are locked by other users

lockPriority.title: Default Lock Priority
lockPriority.description: Default priority level for lock acquisition in conflict scenarios

permissions.title: Role-Based Permission Configuration
permissions.description: Access control settings with role-based permissions for collaborative editing sessions

enablePermissions.title: Enable Permission Management
enablePermissions.description: Enable role-based access control for collaborative sessions

defaultRole.title: Default User Role
defaultRole.description: Default role assigned to users joining collaborative sessions
enumDescriptions: Read-only access to notebook content
Standard editing access to notebook content
Advanced editing with execution permissions
Administrative access with permission management

allowRoleEscalation.title: Allow Role Escalation
allowRoleEscalation.description: Allow users to request higher permission levels during collaborative sessions

sessionBasedPermissions.title: Enable Session-Based Permissions
sessionBasedPermissions.description: Use temporary session-specific permissions instead of persistent user roles

permissionTimeout.title: Permission Timeout (seconds)
permissionTimeout.description: Timeout for temporary permission grants in collaborative sessions

auditPermissionChanges.title: Audit Permission Changes
auditPermissionChanges.description: Log all permission changes for security auditing and compliance

comments.title: Collaborative Comments Configuration
comments.description: Threaded comment system settings for collaborative review and annotation workflows

enableComments.title: Enable Collaborative Comments
enableComments.description: Allow users to create threaded comments and annotations within shared notebooks

enableThreadedComments.title: Enable Threaded Comments
enableThreadedComments.description: Support nested comment threads for detailed discussions

enableMentions.title: Enable @Mentions
enableMentions.description: Allow users to mention and notify other collaborators in comments

commentModeration.title: Comment Moderation Level
commentModeration.description: Level of moderation required for comments in collaborative sessions
enumDescriptions: No comment moderation or filtering
Basic spam and inappropriate content filtering
Moderate review with approval workflow
Strict moderation requiring admin approval

maxCommentLength.title: Maximum Comment Length
maxCommentLength.description: Maximum character limit for individual comments

commentNotifications.title: Enable Comment Notifications
commentNotifications.description: Send notifications when users are mentioned or replies are added

enableCommentHistory.title: Enable Comment Edit History
enableCommentHistory.description: Track and display edit history for collaborative comments

history.title: Version History and Change Tracking
history.description: Document version control and collaborative change tracking configuration

enableVersionHistory.title: Enable Version History Tracking
enableVersionHistory.description: Maintain detailed version history with rollback capabilities for collaborative sessions

enableUndoRedo.title: Enable Undo/Redo Functionality
enableUndoRedo.description: Support undo/redo operations in collaborative editing context

maxUndoStackSize.title: Maximum Undo Stack Size
maxUndoStackSize.description: Maximum number of operations that can be undone

autoSaveInterval.title: Auto-save Interval (seconds)
autoSaveInterval.description: Frequency of automatic document snapshots during collaborative editing

enableSnapshots.title: Enable Document Snapshots
enableSnapshots.description: Create periodic snapshots of document state for version tracking

snapshotInterval.title: Snapshot Interval (minutes)
snapshotInterval.description: Frequency of automatic document snapshots for version history

maxOperationsBeforeSnapshot.title: Max Operations Before Snapshot
maxOperationsBeforeSnapshot.description: Maximum number of operations before forcing a snapshot

historyRetentionDays.title: History Retention (days)
historyRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain version history data

userInterface.title: Collaborative UI Component Settings
userInterface.description: Configuration for collaborative UI elements, themes, and visual indicators

showCollaborationBar.title: Show Collaboration Status Bar
showCollaborationBar.description: Display persistent collaboration status bar with participant list and session controls

collaborationBarPosition.title: Collaboration Bar Position
collaborationBarPosition.description: Screen position for the collaboration status bar

showConnectionStatus.title: Show Connection Status
showConnectionStatus.description: Display real-time WebSocket connection health indicators

enableSharingControls.title: Enable Sharing Controls
enableSharingControls.description: Show session sharing and invite controls in collaboration UI

enableFeatureToggles.title: Enable Feature Toggles
enableFeatureToggles.description: Allow users to enable/disable specific collaboration features

theme.title: Collaboration UI Theme
theme.description: Visual theme for collaboration UI components
enumDescriptions: Light theme with bright colors
Dark theme with muted colors
Automatically match system theme preference

compactMode.title: Compact Mode
compactMode.description: Use compact layout for collaboration UI on smaller screens

animationsEnabled.title: Enable UI Animations
animationsEnabled.description: Enable smooth animations for collaboration state changes

performance.title: Performance Optimization Settings
performance.description: Performance tuning for collaborative editing operations and resource management

enableMetrics.title: Enable Performance Metrics
enableMetrics.description: Collect and monitor performance metrics for collaborative operations

enableBatching.title: Enable Operation Batching
enableBatching.description: Batch multiple operations together for improved network efficiency

memoryOptimization.title: Memory Optimization Level
memoryOptimization.description: Level of memory optimization for collaborative document handling
enumDescriptions: Minimal optimization, prioritize speed
Balanced optimization for typical usage
Aggressive optimization, prioritize memory conservation

bandwidthOptimization.title: Enable Bandwidth Optimization
bandwidthOptimization.description: Optimize network usage for low-bandwidth environments

compressionEnabled.title: Enable Data Compression
compressionEnabled.description: Compress collaborative messages for reduced bandwidth usage

maxConcurrentOperations.title: Max Concurrent Operations
maxConcurrentOperations.description: Maximum number of simultaneous collaborative operations

debugging.title: Debug and Development Settings
debugging.description: Development and debugging configuration for collaborative editing troubleshooting

enableDebugLogging.title: Enable Debug Logging
enableDebugLogging.description: Enable detailed logging for collaboration system debugging

logLevel.title: Collaboration Log Level
logLevel.description: Logging verbosity for collaboration events and operations

enableProfiling.title: Enable Performance Profiling
enableProfiling.description: Enable detailed performance profiling for development purposes

enableTracing.title: Enable Operation Tracing
enableTracing.description: Trace collaborative operations for debugging synchronization issues

debugPanelEnabled.title: Enable Debug Panel
debugPanelEnabled.description: Show developer debug panel for real-time collaboration monitoring

mockCollaborationMode.title: Mock Collaboration Mode
mockCollaborationMode.description: Enable mock collaboration for testing without real WebSocket connections

experimental.title: Experimental Features
experimental.description: Experimental collaboration features that may change in future versions

enableP2PCollaboration.title: Enable Peer-to-Peer Collaboration
enableP2PCollaboration.description: Experimental direct peer-to-peer collaboration without server coordination

enableOfflineSync.title: Enable Offline Synchronization
enableOfflineSync.description: Experimental offline editing with synchronization when reconnected

enableCollaborativeWidgets.title: Enable Collaborative Widgets
enableCollaborativeWidgets.description: Experimental collaborative interactive widgets and outputs

enableVoiceComments.title: Enable Voice Comments
enableVoiceComments.description: Experimental voice annotation support for collaborative reviews

enableVideoCollaboration.title: Enable Video Collaboration
enableVideoCollaboration.description: Experimental video chat integration within collaborative sessions
